inputs.name: part
inputs.description:
The part of the date to render
`'day' | 'month' | 'year' | 'hour' | 'minute' | 'second' | 'dayPeriod' | 'literal' | 'timeZoneName'`

inputs.name: granularity
inputs.description:
The granularity to use for formatting the field. Defaults to 'day' if a CalendarDate is provided, otherwise defaults to 'minute'.
The field will render segments for each part of the date up to and including the specified granularity.

inputs.name: hideTimeZone
inputs.description: Whether or not to hide the time zone segment of the field.

inputs.name: hourCycle
inputs.description: The hour cycle to use for formatting times. Defaults to the locale preference

inputs.name: isDateUnavailable
inputs.description: A matcher that marks specific dates as unavailable; a matched value makes the field invalid.

inputs.name: locale
inputs.description: The locale to use for formatting dates.

inputs.name: maxValue
inputs.description: The maximum valid date that can be entered.

inputs.name: minValue
inputs.description: The minimum valid date that can be entered.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: The placeholder date, which is used to determine what month to display when no date is selected. This updates as the user navigates the calendar and can be used to programmatically control the calendar view

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Whether or not the field is readonly.

inputs.name: step
inputs.description: The stepping interval for the time fields. Defaults to 1

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
The controlled value of the date field. `null` represents an empty field and keeps the value
addressable as an Angular Signal Forms child field (`undefined` denotes an absent optional path).

inputs.name: dirty
inputs.description: Whether the value changed from its initial value. Merged with internal tracking.

inputs.name: errors
inputs.description: Validation errors for the control. A non-empty list marks it invalid.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Whether the control is invalid. A non-empty {@link errors} list also marks it invalid.

inputs.name: pending
inputs.description: Whether async validation is pending. Pending controls publish neither `data-valid` nor `data-invalid`.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Whether the control has been touched. A `model()` so Signal Forms can write it; set on blur/focus-out.

outputs.name: touch
outputs.description: Emits when the control is touched, notifying Signal Forms (stable Angular 22 contract).
